text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the Muses and I are volunteering at a
children's hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The plan is for them to chat with the children in
the courtyard and perform a small concert too.
However...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for dropping by all of a sudden, but would
you like to talk with us for a little while?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little earlier...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: No way, one of the kids isn't coming?

text_block_list.name: Hospital Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately not. This morning, she decided all
of a sudden that she doesn't want to leave her
room...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that... she's scared of us? I get antsy
about first meetings too...

text_block_list.name: Hospital Staff A
text_block_list.text:
She was hospitalized only last week for an injury. I
expect she's struggling to come to terms with it
all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And the loneliness is probably getting to her too,
with her being in a hospital so far away from her
family.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Dragging her out of her room might only cause
her further distress. What would be the best
course of action here?

text_block_list.name: Hospital Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Her parents mentioned that she loves to watch
the Beauty Dream Cup. Perhaps that has
something to do with it...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Um... then, would it be okay if we went to see her
in her room? I'd like to try talking with her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Guess what, all of us here ran in the Beauty
Dream Cup. Did you see us race?

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, I saw you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I'm so happy to hear that. So, what did you
think of our running?

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text: Um, I thought your outfits were... No, it's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The little girl clams up before finishing her
sentence. It does seem like she has a lot of love
for the Muses, though. In that case...
choice_data_list: Why don't we show her your outfits?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You know, that's a lovely idea! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! So this is what the Muses' outfits look like
in real life!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. So, whaddya think? Do we all look cute?

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You look like a princess, Curren! And Fine,
you're just like a fairy!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you fond of fairies? Actually, I'm from the
land of fairies.

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text: The land of fairies?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I come from a country with many
beautiful trees and lakes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And for years and years, humans and fairies have
lived there together. They do have scuffles
sometimes, but they work together just as often.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why, even though it's very far away, the
land of fairies—my home country—will always
mean a lot to me.

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text:
...Fine, aren't you lonely being so far away from
home?

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you sad that you can't see your mom and
dad?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. No, I'm not lonely at all. Because not a
day goes by that I don't think about them.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Take a look. This dress represents the love I have
for my home.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I can do my best because I know there are people
who care about me. They're far away, but
everyone back home gives me strength.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's something we've got in common, isn't it?
You're a strong girl too, braving the loneliness of
being away from your parents.

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text: I'm... strong?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You are! ♪ You're very strong, and you're doing
your best here.

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text: I'm strong and... I'm doing my best.

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text:
...Um, actually, I really do want to see your
concert!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, a huge crowd of children comes to see
the exciting performance...

text_block_list.name: Hospital Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for today. The children look
so happy...

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Fine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, have you come to see me off?

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Um, when I leave the hospital, I'm going
to come to your races to cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well then, now I really have to run my very best! I
can't wait until that day comes. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the young girl makes her promise, a huge
smile lights up her face. It looks like Fine Motion
has really stolen her heart!

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Boy A
text_block_list.text: Nooo, you're leaving already?!

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Boy B
text_block_list.text: Don't go! Sing us one more song!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a lovely request. ♪ What do you
think, Curren?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If it's an encore they want, it's a super-cute
encore they'll get! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Muses return to the courtyard for one last
performance, and in the end, their visit turns out
to be a huge success.

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Children
text_block_list.text: Thank you all so much!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What a wonderfully exciting day. Would you mind
if we came for another visit sometime?

text_block_list.name: Hospitalized Boy A
text_block_list.text: Really?! Is that a promise?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, it's a promise. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, we'll be leaving now. Thank you so much for
having us! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The children see the Muses off, and the successful
hospital visit comes to an end.
